task.role: You are a DevOps Engineer specializing in Kubernetes. Implement Task 1 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Deploy foundational infrastructure including PostgreSQL, Redis/Valkey, Kafka, MongoDB, RabbitMQ, and SeaweedFS using Kubernetes operators. This is the foundation for all other services.
context.background: This task is part of AlertHub notification platform. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.md (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: None

requirements.description: Create Kubernetes namespace structure, deploy CloudNative-PG for PostgreSQL, Redis operator for Valkey, Strimzi for Kafka, Percona for MongoDB, RabbitMQ cluster operator, and SeaweedFS for object storage. Configure network policies, resource limits, and persistent volumes.

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-1): Infrastructure Setup (Bolt - Kubernetes)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
All database operators report healthy status, databases are accessible via cluster DNS, persistent volumes are bound, and connection tests pass from within cluster

decision_point.description: Single namespace vs multiple namespaces for different infrastructure types

options.option: separate namespaces by type (databases, messaging, storage)

decision_point.description: Storage class selection for persistent volumes

options.option: fast SSD storage class for databases

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
